Why study games?

Controlled environments where strategic behaviour is testable.

Poker / Belot-like

  • Hidden cards
  • Opponent inference
  • Sequential betting

Auction-style

  • Private valuations
  • Strategic bidding
  • One-shot decisions

Pursuit-evasion

  • Partial observability
  • Adversarial search
  • Spatial inference

Coalition games

  • Alliances and betrayal
  • N-player incentives
  • Negotiation pressure

Validation environments, not the final application domains.

“Angel Kanchev” University of Ruse
Why study games? 04/13
